Claw & Order: CKB AI Agent Hackathon officially begins

Nervos Network has announced Claw & Order: CKB AI Agent Hackathon — a new hackathon focused on building AI agents on CKB. Registration is open to all developers, and the event is designed to push agentic AI on blockchain

Starknet has officially launched the bounty program for Starkzap – an open-source TypeScript SDK that enables seamless integration of Bitcoin, stablecoins, and DeFi in just minutes.

Total prize pool: $4,500 across 3 weeks (March 27 – April 17, 2026).

> Developer Bounty: $3,000

$4,500 up for grabs

if you’re a builder or content creator, don’t sleep on this.
